revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:qq]]{{Hidden category}}[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:8月24日 (旧暦)); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:48, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/21921983 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:48, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:8月24日 (旧暦) | revid=21921983 --> 「誕生日」欄に「嘉永2年（グレゴリオ暦1849年10月10日） - 河野広中、自由民権運動家（+ 1923年）」の行がありますが、「[[河野広中]]」を見ると、「7月7日」となっており、「[[7月7日 (旧暦)]]」に記載されてます。--[[利用者:Aki4|Aki4]] 2008年9月22日 (月) 13:56 (UTC)

{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:48, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/21921983 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:48, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:8月24日 (旧暦) | revid=21921983 --> 「誕生日」欄に「嘉永2年（グレゴリオ暦1849年10月10日） - 河野広中、自由民権運動家（+ 1923年）」の行がありますが、「[[河野広中]]」を見ると、「7月7日」となっており、「[[7月7日 (旧暦)]]」に記載されてます。--[[User:Aki4|Aki4]] 2008年9月22日 (月) 13:56 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=August_24_%28Lunisolar%29 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=August_24_%28Lunisolar%29 for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-26 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:48, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/21921983 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:48, 26 February 2026 (UTC) <!-- Source: ja:Talk:8月24日 (旧暦) | revid=21921983 --> 「誕生日」欄に「嘉永2年（グレゴリオ暦1849年10月10日） - 河野広中、自由民権運動家（+ 1923年）」の行がありますが、「[[河野広中]]」を見ると、「7月7日」となっており、「[[7月7日 (旧暦)]]」に記載されてます。--[[User:Aki4|Aki4]] 2008年9月22日 (月) 13:56 (UTC)
